title: leucanthemum vulgare var. autumnale
intro: Leucanthemum vulgare var. autumnale, commonly known as autumnal oxeye daisy, is a subspecies of the oxeye daisy plant, characterized by its vibrant yellow flowers and sprawling habit. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been employed to treat various health issues such as wounds, fever, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Leucanthemum vulgare var. autumnale include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a valuable herbal remedy for overall well-being. Leucanthemum vulgare var. autumnale can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
